name: promptguard
description: LLM security for AI coding agents -- protect applications from prompt injection, PII leakage, and data exfiltration

interface.shortDescription: LLM security for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Protect applications from prompt injection, PII leakage, and data exfiltration. Provides MCP tools for scanning text, redacting PII, and reviewing code for LLM security vulnerabilities.
